subject: Allows to launch only instantiation
commit_message:
Allows to launch only instantiation

It is requested to be able to launch instantiation without performing
again onboarding and cloud configuration steps.

Issue-ID: TEST-254
Signed-off-by: jardellos <thierry.hardy@orange.com>
Change-Id: I4e25a0cc4c9e195ed26c96f15ac5ae9a36ec9bfb

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/testsuite-pythonsdk-tests-master-python-lint/70/ : SUCCESS

Patch Set 1:

Dear all,
This is a minor modification with a new settings parameter ONLY_INSTANTIATE to launch only the intantiation request without onboarding and cloud config steps
Regards
Thierry

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

OK
looks fine for me
you tested in master already, right?

at the end our scenarios will be a set of config files..
if we want to leverage pythonsdk-tests to perform // testing e.g. N instantiation in // of different VNFs we will need to have another strategy as we can reference only 1 setting file as input
but it is for further versions (I need to setup the etherpad for evolution)
